title: CONTROLLO DELLA QUALITÀ DELL'ACQUA DA PARTE DEL MARCHIO DI QUALITÀ BELPLUME
description: A guide outlining the Belplume quality mark's protocols for ensuring safe drinking water in poultry operations, including closed systems, biofilm management, and regular microbiological and chemical testing. It provides acceptable bacterial and chemical thresholds, inspection frequencies, and corrective actions for non-compliance.
